PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Joseph Park appeared via zoom for and with Amina Forte (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Amina Forte and Wittie Hughes are appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $611,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
